summary: Tested 3D Dice Roller BG3-style animation and Player Progression Dashboard. All 14 features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: DiceRoller3D.js correctly implements BG3-style sequential animation with phases: sequential -> hold -> smash -> final
Player theme uses blue/cyan (#4DD0E1) flames, GM theme uses purple (#8A2BE2) flames - verified in screenshots
Red glow on nat 1 (fumble) working - screenshot shows red flames and 'NATURAL 1!' text
Green glow on nat 20 (crit) implemented in code with #22C55E color
Edge glow on all 4 borders implemented with corner intensifiers for crits
Compound dice notation (2d6+1d4, 8d6) working - Fireball shows multiple d6 dice
PlayerProgressionDashboard.js renders correctly as 'overview' tab (default tab)
rollDice signature (notation, modifier, label) consistent across CharacterSheetFull.js and CharacterSpellbook.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) 3D Dice Roller with BG3-style sequential animation, blue flames for Player, purple for GM, red glow on nat 1, 2) Player Progression Dashboard as 'overview' tab showing XP bar, stat cards (HP/AC/Spells/Items/Gold), Vitals section, Adventure Timeline, Achievement badges, 3) All 6 tabs accessible: overview, combat, spells, inventory, journal, notes, 4) Compound dice notation working (8d6 Fireball tested). Character ID for Wizard lvl 5: 9e2d3e83-65cb-4ece-a4b0-4f5c156f68c7

features_verified.dice_roller_opens_on_attack_spell_skill: PASSED - Clicking SPELL ATK and Arcana skill both trigger 3D dice roller
features_verified.dice_roller_shows_label_animation_total: PASSED - Shows label (ARCANA, SPELL ATTACK, D20, FIREBALL), sequential animation, total result
features_verified.dice_roller_player_theme_blue: PASSED - Player character sheet uses blue/cyan (#4DD0E1) flames
features_verified.dice_roller_gm_theme_purple: PASSED - GM Screen uses purple (#8A2BE2) flames
features_verified.dice_roller_red_glow_nat1: PASSED - Screenshot shows red flames and glow on natural 1 (fumble)
features_verified.dice_roller_click_dismiss: PASSED - 'Click anywhere to close' text visible and functional
features_verified.dice_roller_compound_notation: PASSED - Fireball (8d6) shows multiple d6 dice with sequential animation
features_verified.progression_dashboard_overview_tab: PASSED - 'overview' tab is default, renders PlayerProgressionDashboard
features_verified.progression_dashboard_character_header: PASSED - Shows level (5), name, class (Elf Wizard), XP bar (6,500/14,000)
features_verified.progression_dashboard_stat_cards: PASSED - Shows HP (8/27), AC (12), Spells (3), Items (0), Gold (100)
features_verified.progression_dashboard_vitals: PASSED - Shows Hit Points and Hit Dice bars
features_verified.progression_dashboard_timeline: PASSED - Shows Adventure Timeline (8 events) with spell learned, level up events
features_verified.tab_navigation_all_accessible: PASSED - All 6 tabs clickable: overview, combat, spells, inventory, journal, notes

test_1_dice_roller_player_theme.description: 3D Dice Roller uses blue/cyan flames on character sheet
test_1_dice_roller_player_theme.evidence: Screenshot shows cyan glow and flames for ARCANA skill roll

test_2_dice_roller_gm_theme.description: 3D Dice Roller uses purple flames on GM Screen
test_2_dice_roller_gm_theme.evidence: Screenshot shows purple glow and flames for D20 and Fireball rolls

test_3_dice_roller_nat1_fumble.evidence: Screenshot shows SPELL ATTACK with result '1', red flames and glow

test_4_compound_dice.evidence: Fireball (8d6) shows multiple d6 dice with sequential animation

test_5_progression_dashboard.description: Player Progression Dashboard renders as overview tab
test_5_progression_dashboard.evidence: Found data-testid='progression-dashboard', XP Progress, Vitals, Achievements sections

test_6_tab_navigation.evidence: Successfully clicked: overview, combat, spells, inventory, journal, notes
